imo.description: International Mathematical Olympiad. Official results by country and year.

amo.description: USA Mathematical Olympiad. Top-tier national math olympiad for high school students.

jmo.description: USA Junior Mathematical Olympiad. National math olympiad for younger high school students.

hmmt-feb.description: Annual February Harvard-MIT Mathematics Tournament. Overall individual scores from the Algebra, Geometry, and Combinatorics rounds.

hmmt-feb-algebra-number-theory.description: Algebra and Number Theory subject test at the February HMMT.

hmmt-feb-geometry.description: Geometry subject test at the February HMMT.

hmmt-feb-combo.description: Combinatorics subject test at the February HMMT.

pumac.description: Princeton University Mathematics Competition. Annual team and individual contest run by the Princeton University Math Club.

pumac-number-theory.description: Number Theory subject test at PUMaC.

mathcounts-national-rank.description: National-level rankings for the MATHCOUNTS competition series.

cmimc.description: Carnegie Mellon Informatics and Mathematics Competition. Annual math contest at CMU with individual and team rounds.

cmimc-algebra.description: Algebra and Number Theory subject test at CMIMC.

cmimc-comb.description: Combinatorics and Computer Science subject test at CMIMC.
